com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.serialportmanager

Interface SerialPortManager

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Module

    public interface SerialPortManager
extends Module
    Helper class for create an instance to communicate with devices on USB or UART3 port.

    How to create an instance of USB or UART3:

         SerialPortManager serialPortManager = (SerialPortManager) NSDKModuleManagerImpl.getInstance().getModule(ModuleType.SERIAL_PORT_MANAGER);
     //Configs of serial port
     SerialPortSettings portSettings = new SerialPortSettings(BaudRate.115200, DataBits.DATA_BIT_8, ParityBit.NO_CHECK, StopBits.STOP_BIT_ONE, true);
     //UART3(SerialPortType.RS232 or SerialPortType.PINPAD)
     SerialPort serialPort = serialPortManager.createInstance(SerialPortType.RS232, portSettings);
     //USB(SerialPortType.USB)
     USBSerialPort usbSerialPort = (USBSerialPort) serialPortManager.createInstance(SerialPortType.USB, portSettings);

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      SerialPort createInstance(SerialPortType type, SerialPortSettings serialPortSettings)
      To get an instance of the type you input.
      SerialPort createInstance(java.lang.String nodeName, SerialPortSettings serialPortSettings)
      To create an SerialPort instance of node name you input.

    • Method Detail

      • createInstance

        SerialPort createInstance(SerialPortType type,
                          SerialPortSettings serialPortSettings)
                   throws NSDKException
        To get an instance of the type you input.
        Parameters:
        type - [required] The serial port type of the instance you want to create.
        serialPortSettings - [Optional] The configurations of the serial port instance, which has default values as following:
        • Default data bits: DataBits.DATA_BIT_8
        • Default parity bit: ParityBit.NO_CHECK
        • Default stop bits: StopBits.STOP_BIT_ONE
        • Default baud rate： BaudRate.BPS115200
        • Default read/write isBlocked: true
        Returns:
        The instance of serial port.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • createInstance

        SerialPort createInstance(java.lang.String nodeName,
                          SerialPortSettings serialPortSettings)
                   throws NSDKException
        To create an SerialPort instance of node name you input.
        Parameters:
        nodeName - [Required] The node name which is used to open the serial node.
        serialPortSettings - [Required] The configurations of the serial port instance, which has default values as following:
        • Default data bits: DataBits.DATA_BIT_8
        • Default parity bit: ParityBit.NO_CHECK
        • Default stop bits: StopBits.STOP_BIT_ONE
        • Default baud rate： BaudRate.BPS115200
        • Default read/write isBlocked: true
        Returns:
        The instance of serial port created by node name.
        Throws:
        NSDKException
